title: Scale CloudNative-PG to 3-instance HA with synchronous replication
subtasks: Edit the sigma1-postgres Cluster CR to set spec.instances: 3.
Enable synchronous replication: set spec.minSyncReplicas: 1, spec.maxSyncReplicas: 2 (or equivalent for your CNPG version).
Configure PgBouncer connection pooling: enable pooler, set poolMode: transaction, max_client_conn: 100, default_pool_size: 25.
Set resource requests/limits: 1Gi memory, 500m CPU per instance.
Ensure PodDisruptionBudget is enabled (maxUnavailable: 1).
Apply the updated CR and verify all 3 instances are healthy and synchronous replication is active.

title: Configure CloudNative-PG automated backups to R2
subtasks: Create a Kubernetes Secret with R2 credentials for barman backups.
Update the sigma1-postgres Cluster CR to add barmanObjectStore configuration: destinationPath, endpointURL, s3Credentials.
Set backup schedule to every 6 hours via ScheduledBackup CR.
Trigger a manual backup and verify backup object appears in R2 bucket.
Test restore by creating a recovery cluster from backup and verify data integrity.

title: Scale Valkey for production with persistence and PDB
subtasks: Check Opstree Redis operator for Valkey sentinel support.
If sentinel supported: create RedisSentinel CR (3 nodes) and RedisReplication CR (1 master + 2 replicas).
If not supported: update sigma1-valkey CR for single-instance with appendonly yes, appendfsync everysec, and PVC for persistence.
Set resource requests: 512Mi memory, 250m CPU; limits: 512Mi memory, 250m CPU.
Create PodDisruptionBudget with maxUnavailable: 1 for Valkey pods.
Verify persistence by writing a key, restarting pod, and checking key is present.

title: Configure Cloudflare Tunnel ingress with ClusterTunnel CR
subtasks: Create or update ClusterTunnel CR for cloudflare-tunnel-operator with Cloudflare API token secret.
Define ingress rules mapping sigma-1.com and api.sigma-1.com paths to frontend and backend services.
Ensure WebSocket support for Morgan (api.sigma-1.com/ws/*) is enabled.
Apply the CR and verify tunnel is active in Cloudflare dashboard.
Verify DNS records are created and traffic routes to correct services.

title: Configure Cloudflare Access policies for admin endpoints
subtasks: Identify admin endpoints (e.g., Grafana, ArgoCD, admin APIs) to protect.
Create Cloudflare Access Application configurations for these endpoints.
Set up identity provider integration and access policies (allow specific emails/domains).
Test unauthenticated access is redirected to Access login, and authenticated access is allowed.

title: Configure Cloudflare R2 CDN with custom domain and cache rules
subtasks: Bind assets.sigma-1.com to the R2 bucket in Cloudflare dashboard.
Create DNS CNAME record for assets.sigma-1.com.
Configure cache rules: images (1 year), thumbnails (30 days), default (1 day).
Enable Cloudflare Polish for image optimization and WebP conversion.
Upload a test image and verify correct cache headers and Polish optimization.

title: Implement Cilium default-deny and ingress network policies
subtasks: Create CiliumNetworkPolicy for default-deny ingress in sigma1 namespace.
Add allow rules for Cloudflare Tunnel to frontend and backend services.
Allow backend services to connect to PostgreSQL and Valkey.
Allow Morgan to connect to all backend services.
Allow frontend SSR to backend APIs.
Verify backend-to-backend traffic is denied except for allowed paths.

title: Implement Cilium egress network policies for external API access
subtasks: Identify all required external API endpoints (Stripe, OpenCorporates, R2, LLM APIs).
Create CiliumNetworkPolicy egress rules allowing only required domains using toFQDNs.
Allow DNS egress to kube-dns on port 53.
Apply policies and verify services can reach required external APIs and DNS.

title: Configure Horizontal Pod Autoscalers for all services
subtasks: Create HPA for Equipment Catalog: min 2, max 5, target CPU 70%.
Create HPA for RMS: min 2, max 5, target CPU 70%.
Create HPA for Finance: min 2, max 3, target CPU 70%.
Create HPA for Social Engine: min 1, max 3, target CPU 70%.
Create HPA for Morgan: min 1, max 2, target CPU 70%.
Create HPA for Customer Vetting: min 1, max 2, target CPU 70%.
Ensure all Deployments have resource requests set.
Apply HPAs and verify scaling behavior under load.

title: Tune resource requests and limits for all services
subtasks: Query Prometheus for p95 resource usage of each service.
Set resource requests to p95, limits to 1.5-2x requests for each Deployment.
Update Deployment specs for Equipment Catalog, RMS, Finance, Social Engine, Morgan, Customer Vetting, and Website.
Apply changes and monitor for OOMKills or CPU throttling.
Document chosen values and metrics.

title: Update sigma1-infra-endpoints ConfigMap with production hostnames
subtasks: Edit sigma1-infra-endpoints ConfigMap: set PUBLIC_URL, API_BASE_URL, ASSETS_CDN_URL, WS_URL to production values.
Update PostgreSQL and Valkey connection strings for production topology (PgBouncer, sentinel if used).
Ensure all services reference this ConfigMap via envFrom.
Perform rolling restart of all services to pick up new values.
Verify services use new hostnames in logs and health checks.

title: Create Grafana dashboards for service health, PostgreSQL, Valkey, and latency
subtasks: Create Service Health dashboard: pod counts, restarts, HTTP request/error rates, CPU/memory usage.
Create PostgreSQL dashboard: active connections, transactions/sec, replication lag, WAL rate, PgBouncer stats, disk usage.
Create Valkey dashboard: connected clients, commands/sec, memory usage, keyspace hits/misses, AOF status.
Create Request Latency dashboard: p50/p95/p99 latency per endpoint/service, heatmap.
Store dashboards as ConfigMaps or GrafanaDashboard CRs for auto-discovery.
Verify dashboards display live data for all services.

title: Create ArgoCD Application CR for sigma1 namespace
subtasks: Create ArgoCD Application CR pointing to infrastructure repo and sigma1/ path.
Set syncPolicy: automated, prune: true, selfHeal: true.
Apply Application CR to argocd namespace.
Verify ArgoCD syncs and self-heals resources.
Test prune by removing a manifest and verifying resource is deleted.
